notableEvents.label: Jake Meyers reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jake Meyers reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Junior Caminero.

notableEvents.label: Raynel Delgado pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Raynel Delgado grounds out, third baseman Junior Caminero to first baseman Jonathan Aranda.

notableEvents.label: Jonathan Aranda GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jonathan Aranda grounds into a double play, second baseman Jose Altuve to shortstop Nick Allen to first baseman Christian Walker. Yandy Díaz out at 2nd. Jonathan Aranda out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jake Meyers reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Junior Caminero.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Enyel De Los Santos on the pickoff attempt.
